name: mcp-server-dart
description: AI-powered project management server for task and document management.

rating.reason: Good overall documentation with clear tool names and adequate descriptions covering functionality and usage context. Parameter documentation is generally comprehensive with proper constraints and examples. Some descriptions could be more detailed about limitations and edge cases, and a few parameters lack sufficient context (e.g., 'o' ordering parameter could be clearer), but the toolset provides solid guidance for effective usage.
